title: Meri Surat Teri Ankhen
writer: Nihar Ranjan Gupta, Qamar Jalalabadi, C.L. Kavish
actors: Ashok Kumar, Pradeep Kumar, Asha Parekh
plot: Raj Kumar is a wealthy businessman and dislikes everything ugly. When his wife, Kamla, becomes pregnant and gives birth to an ugly son, he asks the attending Dr. Mathur to inform his wife that their child was still-born. Dr. Mathu...
